## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss Atlas workflow issues, bug fixes, and feature requests.](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engineers are aware of and working on fixing the issue with disappearing workflow outputs](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [CMs are encountering challenges with word count reduction, link preservation, and title case conversion in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Developers are encouraged to create a staging environment for testing new features before deployment](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Bug Fixes and Updates

  - [Engineering team is addressing the issue of disappearing workflow outputs](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Some users experienced difficulties during live updates, but performance has improved](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Human review feature was added to workflows, particularly useful for publishing steps](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### Workflow Optimization Strategies

  - [For reducing word count:](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [Adjust writing guidelines or outline before reaching the draft stage](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Limit H3s, specify word counts in instructions, or remove unnecessary sections](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Avoid using the Ask AI function for major rewrites as it strips internal links](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [For title case to sentence case conversion:](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines to enforce sentence case for headers](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [Consider requesting a custom pipeline for clients requiring specific structures](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Feature Requests and Improvements

  - [Request for ability to reformat revised content into XML without re-running entire workflow](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a staging area for developers to test new features before deployment](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Ask AI feature is expected to become faster as it's currently in an early implementation stage](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Client-Specific Workflow Adjustments

  - [Custom pipelines are being created for clients with specific structural requirements](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Kirkland is working on implementing templates for custom client needs](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate options for preserving links when using the Ask AI function for content reduction](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Explore ways to enforce sentence case for headers in writing guidelines or custom pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Follow up with engineering team about creating a staging environment for feature testing](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and reporting any issues with the new human review feature in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xZCa93qLzLGZGBcwe1MBJvYQCjwvrU3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
